    Preparing search index...
    • @streamd/parser
    • ParseOptions

    Interface ParseOptions

    Options accepted by parse() and createParser(). All extensions default to false and are opt-in; enabling gfm switches on tables, strikethrough, task lists, and autolinks unless each is individually overridden.

    interface ParseOptions {
        gfm?: boolean;
        tables?: boolean;
        strikethrough?: boolean;
        taskListItems?: boolean;
        autolinks?: boolean;
        math?: boolean;
    }
    • Defined in types/options.ts:15
    Index

    Properties

    gfm? tables? strikethrough? taskListItems? autolinks? math?

    Properties

    Optionalgfm

    gfm?: boolean

    Enable all GFM extensions at once. Default: false

    • Defined in types/options.ts:17

    Optionaltables

    tables?: boolean

    Enable GFM tables. Default: false (or follows gfm)

    • Defined in types/options.ts:19

    Optionalstrikethrough

    strikethrough?: boolean

    Enable GFM strikethrough. Default: false (or follows gfm)

    • Defined in types/options.ts:21

    OptionaltaskListItems

    taskListItems?: boolean

    Enable GFM task list items. Default: false (or follows gfm)

    • Defined in types/options.ts:23

    Optionalautolinks

    autolinks?: boolean

    Enable GFM autolinks. Default: false (or follows gfm)

    • Defined in types/options.ts:25

    Optionalmath

    math?: boolean

    Enable math ($..$ inline, $$...$$ block). Default: false

    • Defined in types/options.ts:27
